compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
advertise Titan's inclusive fit, no commas
response:
# TITAN CLOTHING

## Built For You. Built For All.

Every body deserves great style.

Titan makes clothing for big and tall men who refuse to compromise.

Look sharp every day.

Feel comfortable every moment.

Our sizes go from large to 6XL.

No squeezing in.

No settling for less.

Strong fabrics built to last.

Bold styles built to impress.

Titan fits the way YOU live.

Shop online or in store today.

**TITAN. WEAR YOUR SIZE. OWN YOUR STYLE.**
